refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load→travel→dump cycle.
refined_fr.rationale: The candidate FR specifies a single functional obligation: to support achieving a defined cycle time target for a specific operational cycle. It is already focused on what the system must do (support achieving the cycle time target) without specifying how, thus it is solution-neutral and atomic.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle under the agreed duty cycle and site conditions, and verify that the 95th percentile (p95) cycle time is less than or equal to the customer-defined target (CT_target).
sub_frs: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load→travel→dump cycle.

candidate_dps: Optimize load mechanism speed and efficiency
Optimize dump mechanism speed and efficiency
Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize idle time
Implement cycle time monitoring and adaptive control to meet target
selected_dp.selected_dp: Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize idle time

potential_sources: Interdependence of load, travel, and dump operations timing
coupling_check.notes: Selecting coordination as the DP logically separates the timing control from individual operation mechanisms, supporting independence and minimizing coupling between physical subsystems.

assumptions_risks: Assumes that individual operation mechanisms can meet their performance targets independently
Risk that coordination complexity may increase system control complexity
Assumes availability of accurate cycle time measurement for adaptive control
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicitly including a DP for cycle time monitoring and adaptive control to ensure dynamic achievement of the cycle time target under varying conditions.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Coordinates load, travel, and dump operations across vehicles and teleoperation to minimize idle time

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange status and location data with vehicles

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Send coordinated operation commands to vehicles and teleoperation

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicate with remote systems and teleoperation

module_containment_scores.notes: High cohesion as it centrally manages coordination logic; minimal diffusion outside this module.
Vehicles execute operations but do not coordinate; coordination logic would diffuse across multiple vehicles.
Supports remote control but not overall coordination; coordination logic would be fragmented.
Focuses on safety alerts, not operational coordination; poor containment and high diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary to contain the coordination DP because it centralizes the logic for scheduling and sequencing load, travel, and dump operations, minimizing idle time and avoiding diffusion of coordination logic across multiple modules.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution as it handles coordination for multiple vehicles and teleoperation.
Dependency on timely and reliable telemetry and network interfaces may impact coordination effectiveness.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP logically addresses the FR by specifying coordination of load, travel, and dump operations to minimize idle time, which directly supports achieving the customer-defined cycle time target. The DP is well-aligned with the FR and grounded in the acceptance criterion of meeting the p95 cycle time target under specified conditions.

dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The NGHE Solution module has high cohesion and minimal diffusion risk, as it centrally manages the coordination logic. Other modules like Vehicle and Teleoperation have low containment and high diffusion scores, indicating that placing the coordination DP outside NGHE Solution would risk diffusion. Thus, the NGHE Solution is the appropriate IM boundary to contain the DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible by measuring the cycle time p95 against the CT_target under the agreed duty cycle and site conditions, as well as ensuring compliance with the worksite safety plan and operational policies.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: The allocation of the coordination DP to the NGHE Solution IM is clear, with well-defined external interfaces (Telemetry, Tasking, Network Link) supporting the coordination function and ownership clearly assigned to the NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity growth in the NGHE Solution module as coordination scales to multiple vehicles and teleoperation to avoid performance degradation.
Ensure robust and reliable telemetry and network link interfaces to mitigate risks impacting coordination effectiveness.
Consider defining explicit fallback or degraded modes in case of telemetry or network failures to maintain safe and efficient operation.

decision.justification: All gates (FR->DP, DP->IM, FR->IM) have passed with strong justification and alignment. The DP logically addresses the FR, the IM boundary is well chosen with minimal diffusion risk, and verification feasibility and allocation clarity are confirmed. Recommended revisions focus on monitoring and risk mitigation rather than fundamental changes. Given the high safety criticality, it is prudent to stop decomposition here and focus on implementation and verification rather than further sub-FR derivation.

revise.why: Monitor complexity growth and ensure robust interfaces and fallback modes as the system scales, but no immediate revision to FR or DP is needed.

assumptions: The NGHE Solution module can effectively contain the coordination DP without excessive complexity.
Telemetry and network links will be reliable enough to support coordination functions.
open_risks: Potential performance degradation as coordination scales to multiple vehicles and teleoperation.
Telemetry or network failures impacting coordination effectiveness.
evidence_needed: Performance data of NGHE Solution module under scaled coordination scenarios.
Reliability metrics of telemetry and network link interfaces.
Verification results of cycle time p95 against CT_target under operational conditions.
